channel.title: Combined Politepol Feed
channel.description: Merged feed from multiple Politepol sources

item.title: This Week in Explainers: Why Iran war has sent Indians scrambling for LPG cylinders
Iran war: How a surge in oil prices could hit India’s economy
Explained: Why Houthis, Iran’s allies in Yemen, have not joined war
‘Will harm women’s careers’: Why Supreme Court declined to hear plea on menstrual leaves
From oil shock to water shock: How the Iran war is raising India’s bottled water costs
Inside thriving black market in India, where gas cylinders cost as high as Rs 6,000
The mirage of Pax Sinica and Pax Americana: How India’s strategic autonomy paves the way for a multipolar world
item.description: India offers a values-based vision for humankind. Its strategic autonomy has served it well and positions it to rise, offering the world choices beyond the binary of Pax Americana or Pax Sinica

item.title: Why India must rethink maritime security after Hormuz crisis
item.description: It would be naïve to believe that even when the war in Iran ends, the crisis and contestation on maritime trade routes and chokepoints would be over – in fact, a new era of such conflict would only just be beginning

item.title: India’s West Asia playbook: The art of not taking sides
item.description: As the sands of West Asia continue to shift, India’s neutral hand and unblinking focus on its own national interest will remain its greatest diplomatic asset

item.title: Brics is under strain as the Iran war exposes deep divisions
item.description: The future of Brics as a leader of the Global South depends on whether it can move beyond 'symbolic alignment' to functional crisis management

item.title: Gorsam Stupa: A reminder of India’s historic Tibet ties and sovereignty over Arunachal
item.description: Gorsam Stupa stands as a powerful reminder of India’s deep historical links with Tibet and Bhutan, firmly affirming India’s sovereignty over Arunachal Pradesh

item.title: How the Iran war could radical reset the global order
item.description: The escalating confrontation between Israel, the US and Iran risks transforming a regional conflict into a crisis with profound global strategic and economic consequences
